products.name: HVS Electric Control Globe Valve
products.desc: Linear electric globe valve for precise flow/pressure/temperature regulation. PN16/25, −20°C~280°C, Modbus/RS485/4-20mA.
products.overview: The HVS Series electric control globe valve uses a linear electric actuator with a multi-stage precision gearbox to achieve high-accuracy flow control. Designed for steam, hot water and chemical pipelines, it supports 4-20mA, RS485, M-Bus and Modbus protocols for seamless integration with building automation and industrial SCADA systems.

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Cold water, hot water, high-temp hot water, saturated steam, thermal oil, clean water

products.name: HVB Electric Control Butterfly Valve
products.desc: Quarter-turn electric butterfly valve for high-volume flow control in industrial and building systems.
products.overview: The HVB series covers both electric butterfly valves (DN50–DN500) and electric ball valves (DN15–DN300), driven by quarter-turn electric actuators. Dual mechanical and electronic limit protection ensures safe operation. Supports 4-20mA, RS485 and M-Bus for integration with any BMS or SCADA system.

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Cold water, hot water, ethylene glycol solution ≤50%, some refrigerants

products.name: HVA Electric Ball Valve
products.desc: Quarter-turn electric ball valve for fast open/close operation, compatible with various media types including water, steam and chemicals.
products.overview: The HVA series electric three-way valve is available in T-type (mixing) and L-type (diverting) configurations for chiller blending, district heating and industrial process control. Full-stroke response in ≤5 seconds. Supports HART, Modbus and RS485 with IP65–IP68 protection options.

specs.label: Connection method
specs.value: Flange (RF/RTJ), butt weld, socket weld, threaded (small diameter)

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Liquids: water, oil, acid/base; Gas: air, steam; Mixed: hot-cold liquid blend

specs.label: Valve body material
specs.value: Carbon steel / Stainless steel / Duplex steel

specs.label: Sealing form
specs.value: Soft seal (PTFE/EPDM/PPL); Hard seal (Stellite spray weld)

specs.label: Response time
specs.value: Full stroke: 5–15 s (depending on diameter / torque)

products.name: HVM Wired Miniature Ball Valve
products.desc: Compact wired remote-control miniature ball valve for small-scale control systems.
products.overview: The HVM Wired miniature electric ball valve is designed for small-scale fluid control in smart homes, HVAC fan coil units and light industrial applications. RS485 / Modbus communication. 100,000-cycle rated. Compact brass body for tight installation spaces.

specs.label: Nominal diameter
specs.value: DN8 / DN15 / DN20 / DN25 / DN32 / DN40

products.name: HVM Wireless Miniature Ball Valve
products.desc: Compact wireless remote-control miniature ball valve with IoT-enabled remote operation.
products.overview: The HVM Wireless miniature ball valve requires no wiring — powered by a rechargeable Li-ion 3.6V battery with LoRaWAN / 4G wireless communication. OTA firmware updates. 100,000-cycle service life. Ideal for retrofit installations where cabling is impractical.

specs.label: Nominal diameter
specs.value: DN8 / DN15 / DN20 / DN25 / DN32 / DN40

products.name: HVI Solar Irrigation Valve
products.desc: Solar-powered irrigation valve requiring no grid power — ideal for remote agricultural applications.
products.overview: The HVI solar-powered irrigation valve operates entirely off-grid with a 14V monocrystalline solar panel and integrated backup battery (7–15 days autonomy). LoRaWAN / 4G communication covers up to 10km. Bluetooth app for on-site commissioning. IP67 waterproof. Compatible with soil moisture sensors.

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Built-in rechargeable lithium battery (7–15 day backup)
